name: High-Value Deal Escalation
description: When a deal value exceeds the configured threshold, notifies the sales manager and creates a strategy meeting task.
descriptionAr: عند تجاوز قيمة الصفقة الحد المحدد، يُبلغ مدير المبيعات وينشئ مهمة اجتماع استراتيجي.

config.title: High-value deal: {{title}}
config.body: Deal {{title}} now valued at {{value}} {{currency}}. Review and assign senior resources.

config.title: Strategy meeting for {{title}}
config.description: High-value deal requires strategic planning. Schedule a review meeting.
